description: VelesDB Performance Baseline v1.5 — Phase 11 PQ recall benchmark hardening (6 variants)

pq_recall/pq_recall_m8_k256_rescore.notes: PQ m=8 k=256, rescore=4x (HNSW ceiling ~0.876 on 5K/128d synthetic)

pq_recall/full_precision_baseline.notes: Full precision HNSW reference (ceiling ~0.876 on 5K/128d synthetic)

pq_recall/pq_recall_m8_k256_no_rescore.notes: No rescore - raw HNSW with PQ distances

notes: Baseline captured after Phase 01 foundation fixes (postcard migration, PQ hardening, BUG-8)
pq_recall entries hardened in Phase 11 — 6 variants with explicit m=8 k=256 training via VelesQL
Recall thresholds set to 0.80 (HNSW ceiling on 5K/128d clustered synthetic data is ~0.876)
